---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new metric, panel, integration, or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

(What can you not do today? What would be easier?)

## Proposed solution

(How might it work? CLI flag, new panel, new probe, new env-var?)

## Data source (if it is a new metric)

- Source: (e.g. `/proc/net/snmp`, `/sys/class/...`, subprocess call)
- Cost: (rough wall-clock time per read - ms or microseconds)
- Tier: (fast = 10s, slow = 60s, very slow = 5+ min)
- Platform: (Linux, macOS, Pi-specific, Jetson-specific, etc.)

## Alternatives considered

(What else did you try or think about?)

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to docs, similar projects, etc.
